*This form has been triggered by T-Mobile because Supplier has been deemed ineligible to perform services pursuant to pre-qualification standards. T-Mobile provides the opportunity to complete the information requested below to request reconsideration/waiver of such qualifications.*

*Supplier must be current and compliant on all other requirements in Avetta before T-Mobile will consider waiver requests.*

*Information should be provided which directly addresses the deficiencies leading to disqualification. Attach any relevant supporting documentation as applicable.*  

*Contact your T-Mobile Procurement resource for questions or concerns related to this form or the request for reconsideration. Any feedback or approval of this form is provided directly by T-Mobile.* 
___

Supplier Contact Name:
Current T-Mobile Contact Name/Sponsor (e.g. Field Engineering market manager):\n
Circumstance(s) surrounding the cause of failure to pass requirement:
Specify the term for which you request the waiver \n(i.e. When will you pass and how):
Please upload any supporting documents or files surrounding the above issue.
Provide a corrective action plan to address the situation. Corrective Action Plan should have measurable goals and timeframe for implementation.
